What is the speed of light and why does it matter?

---

  A: This perspective shines light on how different people experience and are affected by the topic.

Compassion matters because it centers human dignity and worth. Emotional intelligence is essential for 
---
Use these memories for consistency. Build on past insights when relevant.
wrapped.response: Approximately 299,792 kilometers per second. It matters because it's the universal speed limit for all objects and information in physics — everything travels at or slower than this rate.
